ogTitle: Kulikup vs Kulin West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kulikup and Kulin West.
heading: Kulikup vs Kulin West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kulikup, Western Australia and Kulin West, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kulikup has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Kulin West (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kulikup or Kulin West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kulikup has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Kulin West scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kulikup scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Kulin West scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kulikup or Kulin West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kulikup has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
